name: agent-feedback
description: Provides a living feedback loop for AI agents by reviewing completed work, stalls, and rejected output, then recommending team adjustments.

issues.title: Review agent health and team fit
issues.description: Inspect completed issues, stalled work, and quality signals. Recommend whether the current agent mix is balanced or needs a new QA, engineering, or support agent.

routines.title: Weekly agent performance review
routines.description: Review team outcomes, detect overloaded or underused agents, and propose adjustments to keep the company healthy.
